title: Milestone 1: Harden existing query surfaces and docs
summary: Milestone 1 completed. prism_query now maps feature-disabled and bad-argument user errors to consistent invalid-params MCP responses, session task/agent/limits restore after daemon restart through a persisted session seed, and prism_workset/API baseline hardening is in place with release-build and live-daemon verification.

acceptance.label: Current prism_query and compact surfaces produce consistent disabled-feature and bad-argument errors
Daemon restart preserves or explicitly restores the active task/session context needed for follow-on work
prism_workset and API reference output are strong enough to serve as the comparison baseline for new views
